span.p:
Pass 3 · normal (respects reserve)
cap = total − starter − override − reserve

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EngineInput
cases · shifts · locations · pickupProfiles · effortVectors · nextMorningCapacityMinutes

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 · ENRICH — enrichCase()
classifyPriority() → rank 0–6
computeEffort() → minutes + points

span.p:
4 · RESERVE — computeIronReserve()
max(% next-morning, min/employee) — B.2

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6 · DISTRIBUTE — distributeBundlesByWeightedLoad()
LPT; score = load_ratio + specialist + heavy + bereich
merge protos → one AssignmentBundle / employee

div.style: color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7 · PICKUP — buildPickupSequence()
per bundle: type→number order (§D.3), never feeds back
